label: Datasaurus Dozen reviewed public evidence bundle v1
scope: Independent summary-matrix audit over a canonical-content admitted cross-source package/data snapshot

origin.paperLicensingStatus: Paper artifact not redistributed; bibliographic metadata and a short reviewed source span only
origin.authorityStatus: Cross-source mirror: repository and data mirror revisions are maintainer-declared; the CSV is not claimed to be a same-commit export of the package data object.

case.title: The Datasaurus Dozen
case.subtitle: Licensed public research case · CHI 2017
case.description: The paper reports the same five two-decimal summary values across thirteen distributions; PeerProof checks that claim against an admitted package/data-mirror snapshot.

claim.text: The paper reports identical two-decimal x/y means, x/y standard deviations, and Pearson correlation for all 13 Datasaurus datasets despite visibly different distributions.

evidence.statisticalTest: Mean, sample standard deviation, and Pearson correlation

upstreamExecution.command: Not executed — packaged R example requires an installed datasauRus package runtime
upstreamExecution.stderr: Original package runtime — Not available in this deployment. The pinned source snapshot is provenance evidence, not a standalone runnable package installation; the example assumes package data is already loaded.

blocker.description: The pinned source snapshot is not a standalone installed package runtime; its example assumes the datasauRus data object is already loaded.

verdictScopeDisclosure.dataChain: The R package commit and TidyTuesday data-mirror commit are independently pinned sources; the CSV is not represented as a same-commit export of the package's .rda data object.
verdictScopeDisclosure.doesNotMean: PeerProof did not run the paper's original data-generation pipeline. This result is not a finding that the paper is false or that the authors' publication dataset was incorrect.

review.approvalEvidence: Version-controlled public-case bundle with exact complete file inventory
